review_content.Placements: The eligibility for placement is after 8 semesters or during this semester. There are many companies that have taken interest and visited college for placement. More than 20% of students get placed in well-defined companies. If one fails, then they can be employed in college itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: There have been many festivals, programs, events, sports and other annual technical festival celebrations on campus. There are many books and journals available in the library. Many sports and tournaments are there that are held in college and practiced in college.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in the campus selection. The highest salary package offered is 3 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Zydus, Cadila, and TCS.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel is well-developed and modernised. Cricket and volleyball grounds are fully maintained. Around two students can share each hostel room. The hostel provides vegetarian food with a variety of menus.
review_content.Faculty: All teaching and non-teaching staff members are very humble, well-qualified, and good in behavior with students. They provide us with guess papers in exams for preparation. The pass percentage is 50%.

More than 20% of students get placed in well-defined companies. If one fails, then they can be employed in college itself.
content.Infrastructure: There have been many festivals, programs, events, sports and other annual technical festival celebrations on campus. There are many books and journals available in the library. Many sports and tournaments are there that are held in college and practiced in college.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in the campus selection. The highest salary package offered is 3 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Zydus, Cadila, and TCS.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel is well-developed and modernised. Cricket and volleyball grounds are fully maintained. Around two students can share each hostel room. The hostel provides vegetarian food with a variety of menus.
content.Faculty: All teaching and non-teaching staff members are very humble, well-qualified, and good in behavior with students. They provide us with guess papers in exams for preparation. The pass percentage is 50%.
